comment: Mock tasks used by scripts/showcase to trigger tool cards without a real LLM/provider. Each scenario file references one task by id. The actual fixture execution happens inside Electron showcase mode (added later).

tasks.prompt: Research the current state of local-first AI agents. Use the browser to collect sources, then write a short markdown note in this project.

expectedToolCards.label: Snapshot of local-first AI agent roundup

tasks.prompt: Read src/components/Button.tsx, find the unused props, and propose a minimal patch. Ask before editing.
Run `npm run test` and report the first failing case.
